_comment: Best genome from cpp_test4 generation 4. BER=0.05453, ratio=0.459 vs LMMSE.

_formula.F_down: (M_par_down + C_i) -- cumulative distance A*. Int.Inc/Node.GetParent are int/node-stack no-ops on float.
_formula.F_up: log(sqrt(max(0.5, (0.5 - EC1)/repeat(...)))) -- near-constant, dead weight per ablation A1
_formula.F_belief: max(M_down, EC1) -- clamped A* with floor EC1≈0.348. Int.Sub/Int.Inc are int-stack no-ops.
_formula.H_halt: (mem[k] < new_M_up) -- triggers halt after 1 BP iteration

_insight: F_down = cumulative distance A*. F_belief = max(cum_dist, 0.348). F_up dead weight (A1 ablation). H_halt fires after 1st iteration. Entire genome = clamped A* search. Floor prevents greedy over-expansion of shallow nodes.
